title: Go WebSocket
description: Go WebSocket documents overview material for Go WebSocket in the language domain. It is classified as an entity page for the library class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The route is language / go / websocket / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
